properties.title: Clash in Khartoum
properties.description: Reported fighting between SAF and RSF

properties.title: RSF consolidation in West Darfur
properties.description: RSF is reported to be killing civilians and consolidating control in West Darfur following the fall of el-Fasher, the last army stronghold in the region, in late October.

properties.title: Displacement of children to Tawila
properties.description: Hundreds of children have arrived unaccompanied in Tawila after RSF forces seized control of el-Fasher last month.
